prompt: An adult female soccer babe standing in front of a World Cup stadium stand, with a confident and brilliant smile, waving a support scarf in national team colors, wearing fashionable supporting clothes with soccer elements. The background is a brightly lit modern soccer stadium, spectator stands, and green turf. There are streamers and a slight smoky atmosphere in the air. The image is full of the heated atmosphere of a major international football event, commercial sports poster style, high-definition realistic photography quality, vivid colors, and strong dynamism.
